name: fluxby
description: Local-first financial dashboard for bank transaction visualization

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/landing"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/landing"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/database && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run generate:openapi && npm run build -w apps/landing
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/database && npm run build -w packages/core
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/database && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:tauri: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/database && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w apps/tauri
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/api
